text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the evening, I spot Matikanefukukitaru
standing in a corner of the training track, acting
somewhat oddly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnnnn...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnn... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! It was light out a second ago, and now it's
dark?! When did that happen?! Ack, my knees
hurt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! You're willing to hear me out?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, actually... I'm in a real big pickle right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all happened the other day—just as my
friend-making lucky item turned up...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, I can't thank you two enough! With your
help, my precious handkerchief is safe and sound!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now I can rest assured we'll stay the best of
friends!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Stay the best of friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Our friendship wouldn't exist without my
lucky item!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hang on... So you're saying that we're not friends
unless you have that handkerchief?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you should try believing in us more... And
yourself, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They got so mad at me! And the more I think
about it, the more confused I get!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Our paths were intertwined by the grace of divine guidance, so why would that make them upset?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lack of confidence has led her to believe that
she can't make friends without her lucky charm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that's what brought about the
misunderstanding.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What if the classroom was pent up with
terrible energy? It must have infected their
emotions... that explains the negativity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to idly watch her imagination run amok, I
give her my perspective.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: S-s-so my lucky charm is not the reason we're friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And saying that my friendships were all created
through my lucky charm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is what made them mad at me? Oh... now that
makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Not! That would be preposterous! Why would they be friends with me then?!
choice_data_list:
Your personality is yours alone, and that's why
they like you.

Your personality is yours alone, and that's why
they like you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Say whaaat?! You've gotta be kidding! The world
turning upside down is more likely than that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes no sense! Like that's just...
ridicu—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She freezes on the spot again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnnnn...
choice_data_list:
Maybe you should go for a run to clear your
mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do I... trust them?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course! I definitely trust them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I trust them, so... Ah! I HAVE SEEN THE LIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Those two are extraordinary Umamusume... so by
saying that, I discounted the extraordinary
decision they made!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That was totally rude of me! I have to go and
apologize to them right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, not much else to say then. See you later!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Lucky daaash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Go for a run?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for a change of pace. You and your good
ideas! I'll get to that right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Running at full speed sent all my worldly
distractions packing! My body and mind feel nice
and refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It got me thinking too—I'll talk it out with them
properly tonight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Go for a run?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for a change of pace. You and your good
ideas! I'll get to that right now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Golly gee, thinking too much filled my head with
all sorts of thoughts—good and bad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gee whiz, my mind is a mess! Hmmm, I must aim
for greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
HUPPPPP! Eko, eko, azure seal! Eko, eko, wall o'
rust!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she recites her strange incantation, she pulls a
pencil out of nowhere and rolls it on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... "Showing sincerity leads to good fortune."
I knew it! I must apologize to them right away!
